summary: Iteration 140: Forum image upload with Publitio integration and Profit Tracker hide/show toggle testing complete. All backend tests pass (11/11). All UI features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Publitio integration properly returns 'not configured' status when credentials are not set
Forum posts and comments properly store and retrieve images array
ForumImageUpload component has correct data-testids for automated testing
Profit Tracker hide/show toggle correctly masks all financial amounts with '••••••'
File validation in backend correctly rejects non-image files with informative error messages
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forum image upload feature verified: New Post dialog has 'Attach Images' section with 'Add Image' button (data-testid='add-image-btn'), file input (data-testid='image-file-input'), and '2MB limit' text. Comment section also has image upload. Admin Settings > API Keys tab has Publitio card with API Key/Secret fields and setup instructions. Profit Tracker has hide/show toggle (data-testid='toggle-amounts-visibility') that masks amounts with '••••••'. Publitio credentials NOT CONFIGURED - test endpoint returns configured=false.

forum_new_post_image_upload.details: New Post dialog shows 'Attach Images (optional)' label, 'Add Image' button, '2MB limit' text, and supported formats JPG/PNG/GIF/WebP

forum_comment_image_upload.details: Open post comment section shows 'Add Image' button with same constraints as new post

publitio_test_endpoint.details: GET /api/publitio/test returns {configured: false, success: false} when credentials not set

publitio_upload_endpoint.details: POST /api/publitio/upload validates file presence (422) and returns 503 when not configured

publitio_file_type_validation.details: Backend rejects non-image files with 'not allowed' error message

admin_settings_publitio_card.details: API Keys tab shows Publitio card with API Key (data-testid='publitio-api-key'), API Secret (data-testid='publitio-api-secret'), Test Connection button, and setup instructions

publitio_setup_instructions.details: Setup instructions show: 1) Go to publit.io, 2) Dashboard > Settings > API, 3) Copy keys, 4) Save. Shows 'Free tier includes 500MB storage and 2GB bandwidth/month'

profit_tracker_hide_toggle.details: Toggle button (data-testid='toggle-amounts-visibility') shows 'Hide' initially, changes to 'Show' when clicked

profit_tracker_amounts_masked.details: Clicking Hide masks Account Value, Deposits, Total Profit, LOT Size with '••••••'

profit_tracker_amounts_shown.details: Clicking Show reveals actual dollar amounts again

forum_create_post_with_images.details: POST /api/forum/posts accepts images array, stores and returns them correctly

forum_create_comment_with_images.details: POST /api/forum/posts/{id}/comments accepts images array in request body

ui_elements_verified: data-testid='new-post-btn' - New Post button on forum page
data-testid='add-image-btn' - Add Image button in ForumImageUpload component
data-testid='image-file-input' - Hidden file input for image selection
data-testid='tab-integrations' - API Keys tab in Admin Settings
data-testid='publitio-api-key' - Publitio API Key input field
data-testid='publitio-api-secret' - Publitio API Secret input field
data-testid='toggle-amounts-visibility' - Hide/Show toggle on Profit Tracker
data-testid='comment-input' - Comment textarea on forum post page
data-testid='forum-post-page' - Individual forum post page container

notes.publitio_credentials: NOT CONFIGURED - Integration works but actual uploads will fail until admin adds API credentials in Platform Settings > API Keys
notes.image_upload_flow: UI allows file selection and shows preview, but upload to Publitio fails with 503 until configured
